description: Siththachcharige Sumith and Another Vs. Sudantha Sanjeewa Ahangama and 2 Others before Hon. K. M. S. DISSANAYAKE, J

keywords: Preliminary Objection as to the maintainability of the appeal for noncompliance of Rule 4(2) of the Court of Appeal (Procedure for Appeals from High Courts) Rules 1988-Is it mandatory for the observance of Rule 4(2) of the Court of Appeal (Procedure for Appeals from High Courts) Rules 1988-Effect of noncompliance of Rule 4(2) of the Court of Appeal (Procedure for Appeals from High Courts) Rules 1988.
